prompt:
FIXED FOREGROUND SUBJECT (locked layer): the attached image is a locked foreground layer. Reproduce the woman and her dress EXACTLY and identically — do NOT redraw, recolor, restyle, resize, reshape, or move them. Keep face, skin tone, hair (dark, centre-parted, low sleek bun), the single gold hoop earring, soft natural makeup, expression, hands and full pose pixel-identical. Keep the dress exactly: a cream/ivory cotton midi dress with an all-over small ditsy floral print in muted rust-red, dusty pink, ochre and sage-green on a cream ground, with WHITE crochet/lace trim edging the V-neckline and the flutter cap sleeves, and a smocked elasticated waist — preserve the print, the lace trim and the fabric drape precisely. She stands leaning her shoulder against a wall, three-quarter turned, one forearm drawn lightly across her midriff. Generate ONLY a new photographic background, fully replacing the existing beige plaster wall and cream draped curtain. Keep her leaning naturally with a believable contact point and a soft natural contact shadow where she meets the surface. Soft, warm directional daylight; gentle falloff; editorial fashion photograph; shallow depth of field with the background softly out of focus; photoreal, no text.

BACKGROUND: a weathered cream stone courtyard with a soft arched doorway to one side and trailing white jasmine and muted green climbing foliage along the stonework. Gentle morning light, calm shaded warmth, a touch of rustic architecture.
